HTML
{% include 'header.html' %}

Paste:

HTML
<section class="clients-hero">

    <div class="hero-grid"></div>

    <div class="hero-glow hero-glow-left"></div>
    <div class="hero-glow hero-glow-right"></div>

    <div class="clients-hero-content">

        <div class="hero-badge">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-circle"></i>
            TRUSTED BY BUSINESSES ACROSS INDUSTRIES
        </div>

        <h1>

            Companies that

            <span>trusted us</span>

            <br>

            to build their digital

            <br>

            presence

        </h1>

        <p>

            From e-commerce to aerospace —
            real businesses,
            real products we designed and shipped.

        </p>

    </div>

</section>

🎨 CSS

Paste into clients.css

CSS
/*==================================
CLIENTS HERO
==================================*/

.clients-hero{

position:relative;

height:90vh;

background:linear-gradient(135deg,#17375d,#1f4578);

display:flex;

align-items:center;

justify-content:center;

overflow:hidden;

}

/* Grid */

.hero-grid{

position:absolute;

width:100%;

height:100%;

background-image:

linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,.05) 1px,transparent 1px),

linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,255,255,.05) 1px,transparent 1px);

background-size:60px 60px;

opacity:.45;

}

/* Glow Left */

.hero-glow-left{

position:absolute;

width:420px;

height:420px;

background:#22d2df;

filter:blur(180px);

opacity:.16;

left:-180px;

top:-100px;

animation:glow1 7s ease-in-out infinite;

}

/* Glow Right */

.hero-glow-right{

position:absolute;

width:380px;

height:380px;

background:#0dd6e5;

filter:blur(170px);

opacity:.12;

right:-120px;

bottom:-120px;

animation:glow2 8s ease-in-out infinite;

}

.clients-hero-content{

position:relative;

z-index:10;

text-align:center;

max-width:950px;

padding:0 20px;

}

/* Badge */

.hero-badge{

display:inline-flex;

align-items:center;

gap:10px;

padding:12px 28px;

background:rgba(18,210,223,.15);

border:1px solid rgba(34,210,223,.35);

border-radius:40px;

font-size:13px;

font-weight:700;

letter-spacing:1px;

color:#23d5df;

margin-bottom:35px;

text-transform:uppercase;

backdrop-filter:blur(10px);

}

.hero-badge i{

font-size:10px;

}

/* Heading */

.clients-hero h1{

font-size:68px;

line-height:1.15;

font-weight:800;

color:#fff;

margin-bottom:35px;

}

.clients-hero span{

background:#d8932d;

padding:4px 14px;

border-radius:8px;

}

/* Paragraph */

.clients-hero p{

font-size:22px;

line-height:1.8;

color:#d2d9e6;

max-width:760px;

margin:auto;

}

/* Animation */

.clients-hero-content{

animation:fadeUp 1s ease;

}

@keyframes fadeUp{

from{

opacity:0;

transform:translateY(50px);

}

to{

opacity:1;

transform:translateY(0);

}

}

@keyframes glow1{

50%{

transform:translateY(30px);

}

}

@keyframes glow2{

50%{

transform:translateX(-35px);

}

}

/* Responsive */

@media(max-width:992px){

.clients-hero h1{

font-size:50px;

}

.clients-hero p{

font-size:18px;

}

}

@media(max-width:600px){

.clients-hero{

height:75vh;

}

.clients-hero h1{

font-size:36px;

}

.hero-badge{

font-size:11px;

padding:10px 20px;

}

.clients-hero p{

font-size:16px;

}

}

✅ Output

You'll get:

  • ✅ Same dark navy gradient background

  • ✅ Animated glowing cyan corners

  • ✅ Transparent grid pattern

  • ✅ Premium cyan badge

  • ✅ Orange highlighted "trusted us"

  • ✅ Smooth fade-up animation

  • ✅ Fully responsive

  • ✅ Very close to the hero section in your reference image

This gives your Clients page a strong, professional introduction before you add the client logos, case studies, and testimonials.


You said:

why this happened

ChatGPT said:

This happened because your clients.css is not being loaded. The browser is only rendering plain HTML with the default browser styles, which is exactly what your screenshot shows.

Step 1: Check clients.html

At the top of clients.html, make sure you have:

HTML
{% load static %}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

    <title>Clients</title>

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="{% static 'css/style.css' %}">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="{% static 'css/clients.css' %}">

    <link rel="stylesheet"
          href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
</head>

<body>

{% include 'header.html' %}

If the second CSS link is missing, none of the styles I gave you will be applied.

Step 2: Check your folder structure

It should be:

static/
   css/
      style.css
      clients.css

Not:

templates/
    clients.css   ❌

or

css/
   clients.css   ❌

Step 3: Verify the file name

Make sure it is exactly:

clients.css

Not:

Clients.css
client.css
clients.CSS

Step 4: Check in the browser

Press F12 → Network tab → reload the page.

Look for:

clients.css

It should show:

200 OK

If it shows:

404

then Django cannot find your CSS file.

Please send me these 2 screenshots:

  1. VS Code Explorer showing your project folders (especially the static/css folder).

  2. The top 20 lines of clients.html.

With those, I can tell you exactly what's wrong in under a minute.

1/2

You said:

ok..now add this in clients page ..with same icons ,sizze ,and attractive font and color

ChatGPT said:

Yes, this section will look great on your Clients page. I recommend placing it after the "Trusted Companies" section and before the client case studies.

For the icons:

  • Use the official WordPress and Shopify logos as images (or SVGs) for the best visual match.

  • Use a coding/laptop illustration for the third item, like in your reference.

HTML

HTML
<section class="platforms-section">

    <div class="platform-title">

        <h2>
            Platforms we use for
            <span>Web Development</span>
        </h2>

    </div>

    <div class="platform-icons">

        <div class="platform-card">

            <img src="{% static 'images/wordpress.png' %}" alt="WordPress">

            <h3>WordPress</h3>

        </div>

        <div class="platform-card">

            <img src="{% static 'images/shopify.png' %}" alt="Shopify">

            <h3>Shopify</h3>

        </div>

        <div class="platform-card">

            <img src="{% static 'images/web-development.png' %}" alt="Custom Development">

            <h3>Custom Development</h3>

        </div>

    </div>

    <div class="platform-content">

        <p>

            If you're looking for an agency that elevates your brand
            with creativity, strategy, and innovation,
            then you're ready for us.

        </p>

    </div>

    <div class="platform-button">

        <a href="{% url 'consultation' %}" class="platform-btn">

            Need help to upscale your brand

            <span>→</span>

        </a>

    </div>

</section>

CSS

CSS
/*===============================
PLATFORMS SECTION
===============================*/

.platforms-section{

padding:110px 8%;

background:#f7f9fc;

text-align:center;

}

.platform-title h2{

font-size:56px;

font-weight:700;

color:#173d73;

line-height:1.3;

margin-bottom:70px;

}

.platform-title span{

color:#d89228;

}

.platform-icons{

display:flex;

justify-content:center;

align-items:center;

gap:110px;

margin-bottom:70px;

flex-wrap:wrap;

}

.platform-card{

transition:.45s;

}

.platform-card img{

width:170px;

height:170px;

object-fit:contain;

transition:.45s;

filter:drop-shadow(0 12px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.12));

}

.platform-card:hover img{

transform:translateY(-15px) scale(1.08);

}

.platform-card h3{

margin-top:25px;

font-size:24px;

font-weight:700;

color:#173d73;

}

.platform-content{

max-width:1000px;

margin:auto;

}

.platform-content p{

font-size:38px;

font-weight:500;

line-height:1.6;

color:#163b6b;

margin-bottom:55px;

}

.platform-btn{

display:inline-flex;

align-items:center;

gap:14px;

padding:22px 60px;

background:#ff7300;

color:white;

font-size:24px;

font-weight:600;

text-decoration:none;

border-radius:60px;

transition:.45s;

box-shadow:0 15px 35px rgba(255,115,0,.30);

}

.platform-btn:hover{

transform:translateY(-8px);

background:#ff8618;

box-shadow:0 25px 45px rgba(255,115,0,.45);

}

.platform-btn span{

font-size:30px;

transition:.35s;

}

.platform-btn:hover span{

transform:translateX(8px);

}

@media(max-width:992px){

.platform-title h2{

font-size:42px;

}

.platform-content p{

font-size:28px;

}

.platform-card img{

width:140px;

height:140px;

}

.platform-icons{

gap:60px;

}

}

@media(max-width:768px){

.platform-icons{

flex-direction:column;

}

.platform-content p{

font-size:22px;

}

.platform-btn{

font-size:18px;

padding:18px 38px;

}

}

📁 Images to place in static/images/

wordpress.png
shopify.png
web-development.png

For the most polished look:

  • WordPress: official blue WordPress logo (transparent PNG or SVG)

  • Shopify: official green Shopify bag logo

  • Custom Development: modern laptop/coding illustration with transparent background

This section will include:

  • ✨ Large platform icons with floating hover effect

  • ✨ Professional blue/orange color palette

  • ✨ Bold typography matching your site

  • ✨ Rounded CTA button with shadow and arrow animation

  • ✨ Responsive layout for desktop, tablet, and mobile

It will fit seamlessly with the premium design you've been building across the site.
